subcodes.first_line: All the world hath been created to serve this blessed Day. O peoples of the earth, know ye the value of these days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع عالم از برای خدمت این یوم مبارک خلق شده اند ای اهل ارض قدر این ایام را
subcodes.subjects: @attaining good pleasure of God, @the ephemeral and the eternal, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
